privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: NeuroCanvas ("we", "us", "our") is a mind mapping application developed and operated by Vanja Modrinjak, an individual developer based in Croatia.

details.email_for_recovery: used for authentication, account recovery, and transactional emails
details.password_hash: if you sign up with email/password credentials (we never store plaintext passwords)
details.oauth_data: if you sign in via Google or GitHub, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture URL

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.agreement: These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Vanja Modrinjak, operating under the name NeuroCanvas.

details.eligibility_age: You must be at least 16 years of age
details.delete_timeline: Upon deletion, we will remove your Account data and User Content from our active systems within 30 days
